message:
fix(session-ui): add explicit type annotation for levelType narrowing

TypeScript was inferring `levelType: "unclear"` as `string` instead of
the literal union type. Fixed by adding explicit `: LevelIdentification`
return type annotations to the map callbacks in toSessionLevelSplitResult.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
